nasb.text: And I set my mind to seek and explore by wisdom concerning all that has been done under heaven. It is a grievous task which God has given to the sons of men to be afflicted with.

esv.text: And I applied my heart to seek and to search out by wisdom all that is done under heaven. It is an unhappy business that God has given to the children of man to be busy with.

cnv.text: 我曾用智慧專心尋求查究天下所發生的一切事；原來　神給予世人的，是勞苦的擔子，叫他們為此煩惱。

ccb.text: 我专心用智慧去研究、探索天下各样的事，发现上帝给世人的是极重的苦工。

csbs.text: 我用心求问，以智慧探察在天下所做的一切，这些都是神加给世人极重的担子，让他们在其中操劳。
